description: The scheme for the "Establishment of Entrepreneurs for Breed Development in the Small Ruminant Sector (Sheep and Goat Farming)" falls under the Sub-mission on Breed Development of Livestock and Poultry. The Entrepreneurs / Eligible Entities can establish sheep and goat breeding unit.

name: HIMAYAT- Deen Dayal Upadhyaya-Grameen Kaushalya Yojana
description: HIMAYAT is a placement-linked placement-linked market-driven skill training program by the Ministry of Rural Development for the unemployed youth of J&K. The scheme aims at providing entrepreneurial skills for sustainable livelihood to 30,000 youth of J&K and facilitating access to finance.

name: Semi-Commercial Duck Farming
description: The scheme “Semi-Commercial Duck Farming” started under the State Sector Scheme "Encouragement of Commercial Poultry Entrepreneur and Promotion of Backyard Poultry Production" to support small entrepreneurs in setting up Duck farms with a capacity of 1000 ducks.

name: Scheme Of Assistance To Women Entrepreneurs (Mahalir Udavi)
description: The scheme aims to extend financial assistance to new or existing Micro Enterprises and Small Scale Industry units exclusively promoted by women or having a majority of women entrepreneurs. It provides term loans and working capital assistance up to 75% of the project cost.

name: Goa State Logistics and Warehousing Incentives Scheme: Subsidy Towards Annual Interest Rate Payable On Loans
description: The subsidy aims to support the logistics and warehousing sector by reimbursing 50% of the annual interest paid on construction loans. The benefit is capped at ₹25,00,000/- (Indian Rupees Twenty-five Lakhs) annually per project and is available for up to 05 consecutive years for eligible entities.

name: The Goa State Incentives to Encourage Investments Scheme
description: The scheme aims to create sustainable employment, accelerate investment, and support environmentally sustainable industrial development in Goa. It provides financial assistance and incentives under separate target schemes to new and existing Micro, Small, Medium, and Large manufacturing units.

name: Short Term Financial Assistance To Good Borrowers
description: The scheme aims to meet short term financial requirements related to executing specific orders, seasonal fund increases, or firm export orders. Benefits include loans ranging from ₹5,00,000/- to ₹50,00,000/-, primarily targeting existing Medium Scale Industry and Small Scale Industry units.

name: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana 2.0
ministry: Ministry Of Petroleum and Natural Gas
description: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas (MOPNG), introduced the ‘"Pradhan Mantri Ujjawala Yojana 2.0" in India. The Pradhan Mantri Ujjawala Yojana (PMUY) is a scheme launched by the Government of India in 2016 to provide free LPG (liquefied petroleum gas) connections to women from below-poverty-line.
category: Social welfare & Empowerment, Women and Child

name: Pradhan Mantri Vanbandhu Kalyan Yojana
description: The scheme provides comprehensive support through six key components, including integrated village development under Pradhan Mantri Adi Adarsh Gram Yojana, development of Particularly Vulnerable Tribal Groups, support to Tribal Research Institutes, and Pre-Matric and Post-Matric Scholarships.

name: Pradhan Mantri Rashtriya Bal Puraskar
ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development
description: The Pradhan Mantri Rashtriya Bal Puraskar (PMRBP) is organized to celebrate the energy, determination, ability, zeal, and enthusiasm of our children.

name: Pradhan Mantri Vidyalaxmi (PM-Vidyalaxmi) Scheme
description: The "Pradhan Mantri Vidyalaxmi (Pm-vidyalaxmi) Scheme" aims to provide financial support for higher education through education loans. Under this scheme, financial assistance of up to ₹10,00,000/- is provided to meritorious students seeking admission to domestic institutions.
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Education & Learning

name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojna (PMFBY)
ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana was launched in  2016 with the aim to support farmers by providing an affordable comprehensive risk cover for crops.
category: Agriculture,Rural & Environment, Banking,Financial Services and Insurance

name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
description: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY) is an insurance scheme offering life insurance cover for death due to any reason. It is a one-year cover, renewable from year to year. The scheme is offered by banks/post offices and administered through life insurance companies.
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Social welfare & Empowerment

name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana: Per Drop More Crop
ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: The scheme “Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana: Per Drop More Crop” was launched by the Dept. of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Ministry of Agriculture & Farmers Welfare, Govt. of India on 1st July 2015. The scheme mainly focuses on water use efficiency at farm level through Micro Irrigation.

name: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana
description: Pradhan Mantri Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana was launched by the Department of Pharmaceuticals, in November 2008. Under the scheme, dedicated outlets known as Janaushadhi Kendras are opened to make quality generic medicines available to all at affordable prices.
category: Business & Entrepreneurship, Health & Wellness, Skills & Employment, Social welfare & Empowerment

name: Mukhya Mantri Mahila Kisan Sashaktikaran Yojana
description: Mukhya Mantri Mahila Kisan Sashaktikaran Yojana (MMKSY) is a scheme launched by the Government of Gujarat to empower women farmers in the state. The scheme was announced in the 2018-19 budget and is being implemented by the Department of Agriculture and Co-operation.

name: Pradhan Mantri Surakshit Matritva Abhiyan
description: The scheme aims to provide fixed-day assured, comprehensive and quality antenatal care universally to all pregnant women in 2nd and 3rd trimester on the 9th of every month. It offers free comprehensive antenatal care services at government health facilities.

name: ICAR National Professor And National Fellow
ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: To promote excellence by recognizing outstanding scientists with proven output and outcomes for creating a culture of basic research through their project work in the National Agricultural Research System (NARS).

name: National Service Scheme
description: The objective of the National Service Scheme (NSS) is to develop the personality and character of students through voluntary community service. The scheme aims to promote social responsibility, leadership, national integration, and a spirit of selfless service among youth.

name: National Awards To Teachers (Higher Education)
description: The purpose of National Awards to Teachers is to celebrate the unique contribution of some of the finest teachers in the country and to honor those teachers who through their commitment and industry have not only improved the quality of school education but also enriched the lives of their students.

name: National Youth Award
description: This award is to motivate young persons to achieve excellence in the field of national development or social service and to develop in them a sense of responsibility to the community and thus to improve their potential as good citizens.
category: Health & Wellness, Public Safety,Law & Justice, Social welfare & Empowerment, Travel & Tourism

name: National Savings Recurring Deposit Account(RD)
description: The objective of the National Savings Recurring Deposit (RD) scheme is to encourage people to save small amounts regularly every month and build savings with safe returns at 6.7% per annum.

name: National Post Doctoral Fellowship
description: The “National Post Doctoral Fellowship (N-PDF)” was launched by the Science and Engineering Research Board, Government of India to identify motivated young researchers and provide them support for doing research in frontier areas of science and engineering.

name: Tanariri Music Awards Festival and Awards (National Level)
description: The scheme "Tanariri Music Awards Festival and Awards (National Level)" aims to promote and honor women’s contributions to Indian classical music by recognizing two outstanding female artistes with a cash award of ₹5,00,000, a shawl, and a certificate at a national-level event.

name: Provision of Sports Kits to Players Participating at the National Level
description: This scheme provides a sports kit worth ₹5000/- (including tracksuit, jersey, shorts, socks, etc.) to approximately 1000 players annually who participate in various sports at the national level, selected through their respective sports federations.

name: National Award for Individual Excellence
ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: The objective of this scheme is to recognize and encourage individuals working for the empowerment of persons with disabilities, including those covered under the Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016.

name: National Energy Conservation Award
description: The scheme aims to recognize and reward organizations for their exemplary efforts in energy conservation and energy efficiency.

name: Youth Hostel Scheme
description: The Youth Hostel Scheme is a joint venture of the Central and State Governments of India. It was launched in the early 1960s to promote youth travel within the country by providing low-cost budget accommodation and facilities to students and youth groups traveling on excursions or study tours.

name: Youth Engagement through Empowered Youth Organisations (YESS)
description: The objective of this scheme is to empower young people and youth organisations by providing financial support for development activities. It aims to encourage youth participation in community service, sports, cultural events, and leadership initiatives across Meghalaya.

name: National Youth Corps
description: A volunteership scheme by Ministry of Youth Affairs And Sports to tap the potential of the disciplined and dedicated youth In the age group of 18 to 29 years who have the inclination and spirit to engage in nation building exercises, to serve up to two years in Nation Building activities.

name: Youth Art Training Fellowship Scheme
description: The scheme aims to encourage youth in arts by providing a monthly fellowship and professional training through government institutions.

name: Skilled Youth Startup Scheme
description: Sikkim Skilled Youth Startup Scheme was launched in 2020 and is implemented by the Department of Commerce & Industries which aims at assisting the educated unemployed youth in setting up a myriad of enterprises through loans with back-ended financial subsidy assistance.
category: Business & Entrepreneurship, Agriculture,Rural & Environment, Skills & Employment

name: Financial Assistance to Youth Groups
description: The scheme aims to promote self-employment & entrepreneurship among rural youth by providing financial support. Financial assistance is provided to Mangal Dals affiliated with the department to help them start employment-oriented projects in 18 identified business sectors.

name: Unemployed Youth Employment Generation Programme
description: The Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises Department, Government of Tamil Nadu introduced the scheme "Unemployed Youth Employment Generation Programme (UYEGP)" which aims to mitigate the unemployment problems of socially and economically weaker sections of the society.

name: Unemployment Allowance for the Educated Unemployed Youth Scheme
description: The scheme was introduced on 01.11.1988 which provides monthly unemployment allowance to the educated unemployed youth registered with the Employment Exchanges in Haryana.

name: Sanctioning Spectacles to Senior Citizens
description: The "Sanctioning Spectacles to Senior Citizens" scheme aims to provide spectacles to senior citizens. This initiative ensures that eligible senior citizens receive the necessary support to improve their vision and enhance their quality of life.

name: AVYAY - National Action Plan for Senior Citizens: Health and Shelter for Senior Citizens
ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: The scheme aims to improve the quality of life of Senior Citizens, particularly those who are indigent, by providing basic amenities like shelter, food, medical care and entertainment opportunities. The scheme provides financial assistance for projects such as maintenance of Senior Citizen Homes.
category: Housing & Shelter, Social welfare & Empowerment, Health & Wellness

name: Pension Scheme to Old Age Persons (Senior Citizen)-DNH&DD
description: The objective of this scheme is to provide financial support to eligible senior citizens to cater to their basic needs. The scheme benefits senior citizens aged 60 years and above, providing a monthly pension of ₹1,500/- for those aged 60–69 years and ₹2,000/- for those aged 70 years and above.
states: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu

name: Free Distribution of Blankets and Chappals to Senior Citizen
description: The scheme “Free Distribution of Blankets and Chappals to Senior Citizen" was launched by the Dept of Social Welfare, Govt of Puducherry. The objective of this scheme is to enable the poor senior citizens, aged 60 years and above and residing in Puducherry, to receive blankets and chappals.

name: ICSSR Senior Fellowship
description: The Indian Council of Social scientific Research (ICSSR), under the Ministry of Education, offers a Senior Fellowship Scheme designed to assist accomplished Indian researchers in conducting advanced social science research.

name: Mandahasam Scheme To Provide Artificial Dentures To Senior Citizens
description: The scheme “Mandahasam Scheme to Provide Artificial Dentures to Senior Citizens” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

name: Sanction of Adult Sticks to Senior Citizens
description: The "Sanction of Adult Sticks to Senior Citizens" scheme aims to provide walking sticks to senior citizens. This initiative ensures that eligible senior citizens receive the necessary support to enhance their mobility and independence.

name: State Senior Citizens Home
description: The Social Welfare & Tribal Affairs Department, Government of Mizoram launched the State Senior Citizens Home for the homeless aged persons. It provides shelter and facilities to homeless elderly individuals aged 60 and above, who lack family support.

name: Scheme For Award Of Senior/Junior Fellowships To Outstanding Persons In The Fields Of Culture
description: The scheme “Scheme for Award of Senior/Junior Fellowships to Outstanding Persons in the Fields of Culture” was launched by the Ministry of Culture, Government of India.

name: Vayomadhuram Scheme For Providing Glucometer To Senior Citizens
description: The scheme “Vayomadhuram Scheme for Providing Glucometer to Senior Citizens” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

name: Jharkhand State Food Security Scheme
description: The "Jharkhand State Food Security Scheme (JSFSS)" by the Department of Food, Public Distribution and Consumer Affairs, Government of Jharkhand, aims to ensure food security by providing subsidized/free rice to eligible Green Card holders.

name: Government Food Science Training Centre
description: The scheme aims to provide specialized education and skill development in food processing, canning, bakery, confectionery, and cookery to students from Uttarakhand, empowering them with technical knowledge and practical expertise to pursue careers in the food industry and promote entrepreneurship.

name: Food Safety & Standards Authority Of India (FSSAI) Internship Scheme
description: The Internship Program by the FSSAI provides interns with unique learning opportunities in various areas of food regulation of food safety administration. FSSAI is a statutory body established under the Food Safety & Standards Act, 2006 under the aegis of the Ministry of Health & Family Welfare.

name: Community Food Processing Centre
description: The scheme aims to promote skill development and entrepreneurship in food processing by enabling individuals and farmers to process fruits and vegetables, add value to their produce, and enhance income opportunities through community-based facilities.

name: Food Bill Assistance to SC Students
description: The food bill assistance at the rate of ₹1,500/- per month (Up to 10 Months) will be granted to the Scheduled Caste (SC) students admitted in college-affiliated hostels.

name: National Food Security Scheme (Priority Households - White Ration Card) - Uttarakhand
description: The scheme aims to ensure food security for economically vulnerable and priority households in Uttarakhand by providing them with a guaranteed monthly supply of food grains at subsidized rates. Under the scheme, the eligible households are entitled to 5 kg of food grains per person per month.

name: Mobile Food Court Van (DAADC)
description: The scheme aims to generate self-employment opportunities in the food and beverage sector by providing credit to unemployed scheduled caste individuals belonging to Antyodaya families. Under this scheme, loans are provided to the eligible beneficiaries at a concessional interest rate.
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Business & Entrepreneurship, Skills & Employment

name: National Food Security Scheme (Antyodaya Anna Yojana - Pink Ration Card) - Uttarakhand
description: The scheme aims to ensure food security for the poorest and most vulnerable families by providing them with subsidized food grains under the Antyodaya category in the state. Under the scheme, eligible beneficiaries receive 35 kg of food grains and 1 kg of sugar per ration card at subsidized rates.

name: National Food Security Mission NFSM
ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: National Food Security Mission was launched in 2007-08 to increase the production of rice, wheat and pulses. Later, coarse cereals, nutri cereals, commercial crops (sugarcane, jute, and cotton) were also added to the mission.

name: Self-Employment Scheme: Transport/ Logistics/ Travels/ Food Court Wyaaj Sahaay
description: "Transport/ Logistics/ Travels/ Food Court Wyaaj Sahaay" is a component under the "Self-Employment Scheme" that provides 5% interest subsidy on a bank loan of ₹6,00,000/- for purchasing vehicles and setting up the required infrastructure.
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Business & Entrepreneurship

name: Tap Water Scheme (Nal Jal Yojana)
description: "Tap Water Scheme" (नल जल योजना) by the Panchayat and Rural Development Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh aims to provide clean water in Gram Panchayat areas in an accessible manner. The application has to be made to the concerned Gram Panchayat.

name: Life Saving Technique Water Sports Operator
description: The scheme aims to train youth of the state as certified trainers and operators in water life-saving techniques. Under this scheme, training opportunities are provided to selected beneficiaries to develop water safety and rescue skills.

name: To Assist the Farmers for Construction of Community Base Water Tank/Storage Structure for Efficient Use of Water Through Drip Irrigation
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to farmers for constructing community-based water tanks/storage structures to ensure efficient water use through drip irrigation.

name: Solar Water Heating System (Domestic Sector)
description: The scheme "Solar Water Heating System (Domestic Sector)" by the Renewable Energy Department, Haryana, aims to promote the use of solar energy for domestic water heating by providing a financial subsidy to the residents of Haryana and Haryana Government employees residing in Chandigarh.

name: Development Support for Coffee in Traditional Areas: Water Augmentation
description: The scheme "Development Support for Coffee in Traditional Areas: Water Augmentation" by the Coffee Board, Department of Commerce, aims to improve the production and productivity of coffee plantations by encouraging water augmentation in traditional areas.

name: Assistance for Cattleshed, Gaman, Water Tank and Bucket
description: The scheme "Assistance for Cattleshed, Gaman, Water Tank and Bucket" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Dept., Gujarat, aims to support livestock farmers by offering financial assistance for essential infrastructure such as cattle sheds, gaman, water tanks, and buckets.

name: Solar Water Heater Yojana - Uttarakhand Renewable Energy Development Agency
description: The scheme aims to promote the use of solar energy for water heating in the state to reduce dependence on conventional electricity and fossil fuels, and to encourage the adoption of green and sustainable energy sources in Uttarakhand.

name: Mukhyamantri Gramin Peyjal Nishchay Yojana
description: The scheme aims to provide pure drinking water through pipelines to every rural household in Bihar. This initiative started in 2016 with a focus on community involvement, local governance, and sustainable water management.

name: Development of Brackish Water Aquaculture
description: The scheme "Development of Brackish Water Aquaculture" introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat, aims to support the development of brackish water aquaculture through financial assistance for infrastructure, equipment, and modern shrimp farming techniques.

name: Scheme to Encourage the Children of Sanitation Workers Who have Passed the Class 10/12 Examination (GSKVN)
description: Under this scheme, children of sanitation workers who have achieved first, second, or third rank in the board exams of Class 10 and Class 12 (General Stream and Science Stream) across the state are awarded cash prizes and certificates of appreciation.

name: Additional Financial Assistance for the Children of Persons Engaged in the Cleaning Profession
description: This scheme aims to provide additional financial assistance of ₹500/- per month to children of individuals working in cleaning/sanitation profession. This assistance is given to students already receiving a scholarship under Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme, ensuring their continued education.

name: Swachh Bharat Mission – Grameen PHASE I
description: The scheme aims to eliminate open defecation and improve rural sanitation by supporting toilet construction and promoting usage among poor and marginalized rural households.

name: Pashu Palan Yojana (GSKVN)
description: Under this scheme, loans of up to ₹1,00,000 are provided to sanitation workers and their dependents at an interest rate of 6% for self-employment in animal husbandry or related activities.
category: Agriculture,Rural & Environment, Banking,Financial Services and Insurance

name: Safai Karmakaar Kaushal Unnayan Yojana
description: Chhattisgarh State Government started a scheme "Safai Karmakaar Kaushal Unnayan Yojana" for unorganized worker on 10 April 2018.

name: Grant of Mahatma Gandhi Memorial Award for Clean Houses
description: “Grant of Mahatma Gandhi Memorial Award for Clean Houses” was introduced by the Adi Dravidar Welfare Dept, Govt of Puducherry. The objective of the scheme is to motivate the Scheduled Caste people to keep their houses neat and tidy. Incentives are in the form of household articles worth ₹500/-.

name: PMMSY:  Establishment of Bio-toilets in mechanised fishing vessels - Gujarat
description: The scheme aims to provide sanitation facilities on mechanised fishing vessels. It provides financial assistance depending on category, with once-in-a-lifetime eligibility.

name: Swachh Bharat Mission – Urban 2.0
description: A sanitation scheme for the construction of Individual Household Latrines (IHHL) for urban households.

name: Swachh Bharat Mission (Grameen) Phase II
description: A sanitation scheme for Visual cleanliness through Open Defecation Free (ODF) sustainability and effective management of solid and liquid waste in villages.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Urban
description: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Urban (PMAY-U) Scheme was launched on 25th June 2015 by the Hon’ble Prime Minister to provide all-weather pucca houses to all eligible urban households across the nation with the vision of ‘Housing for All’.

name: National Renewable Energy Fellowship Scheme
ministry: Ministry Of New and Renewable Energy
description: Through this scheme, fellowships will be provided for pursuing higher studies/ advanced research in renewable energy. The fellowship scheme is directly aligned with the overall requirement of renewable energy, research thrust areas identified by MNRE.

name: National Renewable Energy Internship Scheme
ministry: Ministry Of New and Renewable Energy
description: The "National Renewable Energy Internship Scheme" by MNRE provides internship opportunities to facilitate students pursuing undergraduate/graduate/post-graduate degrees (Engineering, Science, Management, Law, etc) or research scholars enrolled in recognized institutes/universities.

name: National Bio Energy Programme - Uttarakhand Renewable Energy Development Agency
description: The scheme aims to promote the use of biogas as a clean and renewable energy source, help livestock farmers set up biogas plants, reduce the use of conventional fuels, and support eco-friendly rural development in the state.

name: Providing Latest Technology to Group of Pottery Artisans (Energy Efficient Kiln)
description: The scheme aims to provide latest technology and equipment to pottery artisans for better productivity, improved quality and reduce health risks. It provides 100% financial assistance for energy-efficient kilns to groups of registered clay artisans and potters in Gujarat state.

name: Solar Energy Corporation of India (SECI) Internship
ministry: Ministry Of New and Renewable Energy
description: The SECI Internship Policy is designed to provide practical experience to students in the renewable energy sector. The program aims to give interns exposure to SECI's various divisions, helping them understand the renewable energy sector.

name: Incentive Scheme For The Electricity Consumers Under Various Categories In Andaman & Nicobar Islands
description: "Incentive Scheme For The Electricity Consumers Under Various Categories In Andaman & Nicobar Islands" aims to reduce power consumption through demand side management and promote green energy adoption. The scheme offers monetary incentives to consumers who achieve at least 30% energy savings.

name: Incentives to Green Investment Scheme
description: The scheme aims to incentivize investments by existing and new units in environmentally friendly initiatives. It provides financial support through reimbursement for Water and Energy Audits and Capital Reimbursement for Energy Conservation Equipment to eligible manufacturing units.

name: National Solar Science Fellowship Programme
ministry: Ministry Of New and Renewable Energy
description: The “National Solar Science Fellowship Programme” of the Ministry of New & Renewable Energy was launched in February 2011. The aim of the National Solar Science Fellowship Programme is to provide a platform to top-quality scientists and engineers in the area of solar energy research.

name: Scheme to Provide Financial Assistance to Purchase Solar Power Unit/Kit for Solar Fencing around the Farm
description: This scheme has been introduced by the Agriculture, Farmers Welfare and Cooperation Department, Gujarat. It aims to provide financial assistance to farmers for purchasing solar power units/kits for solar fencing around their farms to protect crops from damage caused by wild and stray animals.

name: Chief Minister’s Solar Rooftop Capital Incentive Scheme
description: Chief Minister’s Solar Rooftop Capital Incentive Scheme is a capital subsidy scheme by the Tamil Nadu Government. In this scheme, a capital subsidy of ₹ 20,000 per kilowatt is provided for grid-connected domestic solar PV systems in addition to the 30% subsidy scheme* of the MNRE.

name: Solar Based Hydroponic System
description: The system aims to develop and promote an innovative solar-based hydroponic system that integrates solar energy with modern greenhouse technology and mobile application support.

name: Grid Connected Rooftop Solar Power Plant Scheme - Uttarakhand Renewable Energy Development Agency
description: The scheme aims to promote the adoption of rooftop solar energy among domestic consumers in Uttarakhand by providing financial support and enabling them to generate clean, renewable electricity, reduce their electricity bills through net metering.

name: Capital Subsidy Scheme for Setting Up Solar Plant in Milk Cooperatives in Gujarat State (Tribal Area)
description: The scheme aims to promote renewable energy and reduce electricity expenses. Through this scheme, a 75% subsidy is provided for setting up solar plants (1KW to 40KW) in milk cooperative societies in tribal areas.

name: Intensive Fisheries Development Programme - Subsidy on Solar System for fish/shrimp culture
description: Under this scheme, subsidies on solar systems for fish/shrimp culture are provided to eligible fish and shrimp farmers. The subsidy is given at 60% of the total project cost, or ₹30,000 per kW, whichever is lower. The maximum subsidy is limited to 30 kW for shrimp farmers and 10 kW for fish farmers.

name: Mukhyamantri Saur Swarojgar Yojana - Uttarakhand Renewable Energy Development Agency
description: The scheme aims to promote self-employment among the residents of Uttarakhand by enabling them to establish and operate solar power projects, thereby generating clean energy, providing a sustainable source of income, and encouraging entrepreneurship.

name: Scheme to Provide Electric Scooter to Disabled Person
description: The "Scheme to Provide Electric Scooter to Disabled Person" provides financial assistance of up to ₹25,000 for the purchase of electric scooters to eligible persons with orthopedic disabilities.

name: Gujarat State Electric Vehicle Policy
description: The policy aims to transition Gujarat's transportation sector towards electric mobility and establish the state as a manufacturing hub for electric vehicles. It provides subsidies for electric vehicle purchases and charging infrastructure development to promote sustainable transportation.

name: Dr. B. R. Ambedkar’s Electric Auto (e-Auto) Subsidy Scheme
description: The scheme aims to socially and economically empower Scheduled Caste / Scheduled Tribe women by supporting them in income-generating activities through electric autos. It provides a subsidy up to 75% of the cost (maximum ₹3,00,000/-) for electric autos to Scheduled Caste / Scheduled Tribe women.

name: Chief Ministers Green Taxi Scheme
description: The scheme promotes clean mobility and electric vehicle adoption in the Greater Shillong Planning Area, while supporting green entrepreneurship and sustainable transport through financial incentives.

name: Grant of Subsidy for Purchase of 'Electric Vehicles' to Consumers in State of Goa
description: The scheme provides financial assistance in the form of a subsidy for the purchase or conversion of Electric two-wheelers, three-wheelers, and four-wheelers, along with scrapping incentives for old vehicles, incentives for local manufacturing in Goa, and low-cost loans provided by CESL.

name: Subsidy for Battery Operated 2-Wheelers
description: This scheme is introduced by the Climate Change Department, Gujarat, aims to promote renewable energy and clean transportation by providing a subsidy to students for the purchase of battery-operated two-wheelers from authorized manufacturers.

name: Subsidy For Battery Operated Three-Wheelers
description: This scheme is introduced by the Climate Change Department, Gujarat, aims to promote the adoption of eco-friendly vehicles by providing a subsidy on the purchase of battery-operated three-wheelers.

name: Tool Assistance Scheme for Pottery Artisans
description: The scheme aims to provide essential tools like electric chalk and electric footmill to individual artisans with a 75% subsidy. It benefits pottery workers, particularly those of Prajapati/Kumbhar caste, by offering instrumental assistance and requiring a 25% beneficiary contribution.

name: Grant of Transport Allowance to Differently Abled Persons
description: The scheme “Grant of Transport Allowance to Differently Abled Persons" was launched by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Puducherry. In this scheme, a fixed sum ₹ 300/- per month shall be paid as Transport Allowance to the differently abled individuals.

name: West Bengal Transport Workers’ Social Security Scheme: Pension
description: The scheme provides pension benefits to transport workers of the state upon reaching 60 years of age.

name: Scheme for Small Road Transport Operators (SRTOs)
description: The scheme aims to extend financial assistance for acquiring new transport vehicles, including goods and passenger vehicles. It provides term loans covering up to 70% of the vehicle cost, excluding road tax and insurance, repayable over a max. of 58 monthly instalments.

name: West Bengal Transport Workers’ Social Security Scheme: Assistance on Hospitalization
description: The scheme provides financial assistance to transport workers who are hospitalized for 5 or more days due to an accident.

name: Free Travel in Uttarakhand Transport Corporation Buses to Widowed Daughters-in-Law of Freedom Fighters
description: The scheme aims to provide free travel facilities in Uttarakhand Transport Corporation (UTC) buses to the widowed daughters-in-law of freedom fighters. Beneficiaries under this scheme are entitled to avail complimentary travel across all UTC bus services within the state.

name: Reimbursement of Tuition Fee and Transport Facility to Scheduled Castes Students Studying in Technical Institutions in Haryana
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to Scheduled Castes students pursuing AICTE-approved technical courses. Under this scheme, eligible students receive tuition fee reimbursement and transport facility benefits.

name: West Bengal Transport Workers’ Social Security Scheme: Family Pension
description: Under this scheme, beneficiaries, upon retirement or unfortunate demise, will have 50% of their last drawn amount transferred monthly to their families through a Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) system.

name: Janani Express Yojana
description: The scheme aims to provide free and timely transport to pregnant women for safe institutional deliveries.

name: District Plan: Inter-Village Road Construction Scheme on Contributory Basis
description: The scheme aims to facilitate the easy and timely transportation of sugarcane from farms to purchasing centers and sugar mills by improving inter-village road connectivity in sugarcane-growing areas.

name: Immediate Assistance for Severe Injury in Road/Fire Accident (Sainik Welfare)
description: "Immediate Assistance for Severe Injury in Road/Fire Accident" is a Welfare Scheme by the Armed Forces Flag Day Fund of the Dept of Sainik Welfare, Puducherry. Through this scheme, ₹25,000/- is provided to the registered Ex-servicemen/Widows of Ex-servicemen who have suffered a Road/Fire Accident.

name: District Central Cooperative Banks and through its Branches: Small Road Transport Operators Loan (SRTO Loan)
description: The scheme aims to provide financial support to small-scale road transport operators through loans up to ₹10,00,000/- with 13% rate of interest.
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Transport & Infrastructure

name: Free Bus Pass for Media Persons
description: "Free Bus Pass for Media Persons" scheme by the Dept of Information & Publicity, Puducherry, aims to provide a free bus pass facility to media persons working in Puducherry in Puducherry Road Transport Corporation buses (except town buses) to undertake journeys for their professional requirements.

name: Scheme for Development Maintenance and Construction of Roads
description: The "Development Maintenance and Construction of Roads" was launched by the Pondicherry Industrial Promotion Development and Investment Corporation Limited (PIPDIC), Department of Industries & Commerce. The scheme aims to assist SSI units for the Development & Maintenance and Construction of Roads.
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Business & Entrepreneurship, Transport & Infrastructure

name: Issue of Free Bus Pass to Differently Abled Person
description: The scheme “Issue of Free Bus Pass to Differently Abled Person” was launched by the Department of Social Welfare, Government of Puducherry. The scheme provides free bus passes to all the differently abled persons to facilitate their mobility/transport in buses run by the Government and NGOs.

name: Subsidy to Purchase E-Bike for Journalists
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to journalists in Goa for purchasing e-bikes at a subsidised rate. The benefits include making it more convenient for journalists to gather and disseminate news, with the intended beneficiaries being eligible Goa-based journalists.

name: One Time Cash Incentive towards Learning Driving (Sainik Welfare)
description: "One Time Cash Incentive towards Learning Driving" is a Welfare Scheme by the Dept of Sainik Welfare, Puducherry. Through this scheme, up to ₹4,000/- is provided to the unemployed Ex-servicemen to learn to drive. The driving course should be taken from a Government-recognized School/Institution.

name: Mhaji Bus Scheme
description: The scheme provides a subsidy of ₹3/- per kilometer operated, 50% reimbursement of the annual insurance premium paid up to a maximum of ₹30,000/-, and assistance of ₹10,00,000/- for replacing buses older than 15 years with new buses having a minimum seating capacity of 27.

name: INDIRAMMA Widow Pension (Rural)
description: "INDIRAMMA Weavers Pension (Rural)" scheme aims to disburse monthly pensions to widows, irrespective of their age. To be eligible, they should be from a BPL family, be a resident of the district, and not be covered under any other Pension Scheme.
category: Social welfare & Empowerment, Women and Child

name: Rural Girls’ Incentive Scheme
description: The Scheme provides financial support to girls students of Most Backward Classes (MBC) and Denotified Communities (DNC) studying in rural government or government-aided schools, aimed at encouraging education and reducing school dropouts.

name: Chief Minister Rural Path Vendor Loan Scheme
description: "Chief Minister Rural Path Vendor Loan Scheme" by the Panchayat and Rural Development Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh provides working capital assistance of up to ₹10,000, promotes regular loan repayment, and trains entrepreneurs in business practices. The scheme targets small traders.

name: Rural Technology Complex
description: The scheme "Rural Technology Complex" by the Programme Implementation Department, Government of Uttarakhand, aims to enhance livelihood opportunities in the Himalayan region through the use of local, need-based and environment-friendly technologies.

name: INDIRAMMA Disabled Pension (Rural)
description: "INDIRAMMA Disabled Pension (Rural)" scheme aims to disburse monthly pensions to the individuals 18 years or above in age and having a disability of 40% or above. To be eligible, they should be from a BPL family, be a resident of the district, and not be covered under any other Pension Scheme.

name: Attendance Scholarship Scheme for Girl Students with Disabilities of Rural Areas
description: The objective of this scheme is to uplift the status of the girls with disabilities in the rural areas & also to make them reliant by paying incentives in the form of Attendance Scholarship to these girls.

name: Rural Business Incubators - Uttarakhand
description: The scheme aims to promote entrepreneurship and develop a robust entrepreneurial ecosystem in the state by providing aspiring and existing entrepreneurs with technical, business, legal, marketing, and mentorship support.

name: Ramai Awas (Gharkul) Scheme for SC & Nav-Buddha (Urban and Rural)
description: The scheme "Ramai Awas (Gharkul) Scheme for SC & Nav-Buddha (Urban and Rural)" is a housing scheme by the Department of Social Justice & Special Assistance of the Government of Maharashtra. The scheme aims to raise the standard of living of the Scheduled Caste and Nav-Buddha communities.

name: Prime Minister’s Rural Development Fellows Scheme
description: The scheme aims to provide short term catalytic support to the District Administration in backward districts to improve programme delivery and simultaneously develop a cadre of Development Facilitators. Fellows receive professional experience, structured learning, and a monthly stipend.

name: INDIRAMMA Weavers Pension (Rural)
description: "INDIRAMMA Weavers Pension (Rural)" scheme aims to disburse monthly pensions to destitute weavers who are 50 years or above in age. To be eligible, they should be from a BPL family, be a resident of the district, and not be covered under any other Pension Scheme.

name: Deen Dayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Urban Livelihoods Mission (DAY-NULM): Support for Urban Homeless – Uttarakhand
description: The scheme aims to provide safe and accessible night shelter facilities to homeless people living under the open sky in urban areas, ensuring they have protection and support at any time.

name: INDIRAMMA Disabled Pension (Urban)
description: "INDIRAMMA Disabled Pension (Urban)" scheme aims to provide monthly pensions to persons with disabilities of 40% or above who are 18 years of age or above. To be eligible, they should be from a BPL family, be a resident of Andhra Pradesh, and not be covered under any other Pension Scheme.

name: INDIRAMMA Old Age Pension (Urban)
description: "INDIRAMMA Old Age Pension (Urban)" scheme aims to provide monthly pensions to destitute elderly persons aged 65 years or above with little or no means of subsistence and no family or relative to depend upon. To be eligible, they should be from a BPL family, and be a resident of Andhra Pradesh.

name: INDIRAMMA Weavers Pension (Urban)
description: "INDIRAMMA Weavers Pension (Urban)" scheme aims to provide monthly pensions to destitute weavers aged 50 years or above. To be eligible, they should be from a BPL family, and be a resident of Andhra Pradesh. The eligible individuals will be identified by their respective Ward Sabhas.

name: Deen Dayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Urban Livelihoods Mission (DAY-NULM): Self-Help Group - Uttarakhand
description: The scheme aims to empower urban poor women in Uttarakhand by promoting the formation of self-help groups, improving their livelihoods, and supporting them in income-generating and self-employment activities through financial incentives, bank loans, and government subsidies.

name: Deen Dayal Antyodaya Yojana - National Urban Livelihoods Mission (DAY-NULM): Self-Employment Programme – Uttarakhand
description: The scheme aims to promote sustainable livelihoods and economic empowerment of the urban poor by providing financial support and guidance for establishing self-employment ventures, strengthening their family’s economy, and generating new employment opportunities.

name: Mukhya Mantri Shahri Ajeevika Guarantee Yojna
description: The “Mukhya Mantri Shahri Ajeevika Guarantee Yojna” was launched by the Department of Urban Development, Govt. of Himachal Pradesh. The objective of the scheme is to enhance livelihood security in urban areas by providing 120 days of guaranteed wage employment to every household in a financial year.

name: Jan Nayak Pustakalaya evam Digital Adhyan Kendra
description: "Jan Nayak Pustakalaya evam Digital Adhyan Kendra" scheme aims to develop all Jannayak Karpoori Thakur Hostels, other backward class welfare hostels, and OBC girls’ hostels across the state.

name: Establishment of Digital Learning Platform
description: The scheme aims to establish Digital Learning Platform to provide training and career counseling on various subjects, including ICT orientation, emerging technologies, and more, through both online and offline modes for students of secondary schools across the state.

name: Digital J&K Internship Scheme
description: The "Digital J&K Internship Scheme" is an opportunity for the students to secure first-hand and practical work experience. It also aims at active participation in the learning process through experimentation and putting into practice the knowledge acquired in the studies.

name: Digital India Internship Scheme
ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
description: An opportunity for a student to secure practical work experience under the guidance of a qualified and experienced Supervisor/Mentor in Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) in the form of Digital India Internship Scheme.

name: e-Adhigam Scheme - Free Tablet
description: This scheme was launched with objective of promoting digital education & providing online learning to children from poor & needy families, proving to be a boon for them. Under this scheme, free tablets are provided to students, enabling access to state-of-the-art software & learning materials.

name: Scheme for ‘Skill Development in ESDM for Digital India’
ministry: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology
description: The scheme aims to skill 3,28,000 candidates in the ESDM sector. Through this scheme, training and certification benefits are provided to students and unemployed youth.

name: Development and Dissemination of e-Content
description: The scheme aims to provide free, high-quality e-learning materials to students of classes 9 to 12, covering subjects such as Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, English, etc. in collaboration with reputed ed-tech platforms.

name: SUBHADRA
description: “SUBHADRA” Scheme is a flagship initiative by the Government of Odisha aimed at financially empowering women, improving their socio-economic status, and promoting their safety and well-being.

name: Provision of Special Assistance for Development of Low-Cost Educational Materials (SIPDA)
description: The scheme aims to provide financial support for the development and supply of low-cost educational materials for visually impaired students. Through this scheme, grants are provided to implementing agencies for purchasing and producing assistive learning devices.

name: Free Computer Training
description: The scheme aims to provide a one-year free training course (Computer / Accounting / Web Designing / Digital Marketing) to ex-servicemen, serving soldiers, their widows, and dependents who have passed the 12th standard.

name: Laptop-e Scheme
description: The scheme aims to equip Class XI students with individual portable computer systems to enhance digital learning, knowledge acquisition, and skill attainment for employment or self-employment. Students receive one entry-level Laptop or Notebook equipped with specific technical requirements.

name: Internet Subsidy Scheme
description: Launched in 2018, the "Internet Subsidy Scheme" is one of the "IT Policy Schemes" by the Dept of IT, Govt of Goa. The objective is to provide Internet Subsidy to the eligible Information Technology Units in Goa. 25% reimbursement on high-speed bandwidth, subject to a maximum of ₹ 5,00,000 per annum.

name: The Wired Internet Scheme for Information and Communication Technology Laboratory in Schools in the State of Goa
description: The scheme aims to provide monthly rental reimbursement to avail internet services to the Information and Communication Technology Laboratory in Government and Government-Aided Schools in the State of Goa. It provides a maximum monthly reimbursement of ₹2,000/- for internet rental.

name: Reimbursement of Expenses for Startups Operating from Leased/Privately Owned Premises Scheme
description: “Reimbursement of Expenses for Startups Operating from Leased/Privately Owned Premises Scheme” is a scheme for the Startups of Goa. The cost towards internet connectivity, software license fees and cloud services fees, will be reimbursed.

name: IT Policy and Amendments-2020 - Information Technology Development Agency
description: The policy aims to promote the growth of IT, ITES, Internet Service Provider, and Telecom Service Provider industries in Uttarakhand by supporting startups, and creating employment opportunities for local youth through policy incentives and initiatives.

name: Interest Subsidy Scheme for Smaller Business Units
description: Launched in 2018, the "Internet Subsidy Scheme" is one of the "Information Technology Policy Schemes" by the Department of Information Technology, Government of Goa. The objective and the scope of this scheme is to provide Internet Subsidy to the eligible Information Technology Units in Goa.

name: AICTE - Grant For Augmenting Infrastructure In North Eastern Region
description: The scheme "AICTE - Grant for Augmenting Infrastructure in North Eastern Region (GAINER)" was introduced by AICTE to enhance the functional efficiency of the technical institutes located in far-flung areas of North East India, by addressing deficiencies in water, electricity, and internet.

name: Primary Cooperative Agriculture and Rural Development Bank: For Power Tiller
description: The scheme offers loans to farmers covering up to 90% of the cost of a power tiller, with an interest rate between 11% and 12.25%.

name: Bank Tie-Up Scheme
description: Through the "Bank Tie-Up Scheme", the Punjab Scheduled Castes Land Development & Finance Corporation (PSCLDFC) arranges loans through banks, and subsidy is provided by PSCLDFC. The permanent residents of Punjab belonging to Scheduled Castes and living Below Poverty Line are eligible.
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Social welfare & Empowerment

name: Primary Cooperative Agriculture and Rural Development Bank: For Sericulture In Irrigated Area
description: The scheme provides loans to farmers for sericulture activities in irrigated areas, with a loan amount ranging from ₹49,000/- to ₹79,000/- per acre, and interest rates from 11% to 12.75%.
category: Agriculture,Rural & Environment, Banking,Financial Services and Insurance

name: Primary Cooperative Agriculture and Rural Development Bank: For Plantation (Tea)
description: The scheme offers financial assistance of up to ₹33,000/- per acre to farmers for tea plantations, with an interest rate of 11%-12.5%.

name: Mukhya mantri Krishak Udyami Yojana
description: The objective of this scheme is to provide financial assistance to the sons and daughters of farmers to establish their businesses. the government of Madhya Pradesh provided loans to the bank for all citizens of the state.
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Agriculture,Rural & Environment

name: Primary Cooperative Agriculture and Rural Development Bank: For Poultry Development
description: The scheme offers loans to farmers for poultry development and cattle development, with funding of up to ₹14,800/- for 200 birds or ₹17,000/- for 2 cows, with an interest rate of 14.5% to 16.5%.

name: Primary Cooperative Agriculture and Rural Development Bank: For Inland Fishing
description: The scheme offers loans to farmers for inland fishing projects, with a loan amount of up to ₹3,30,000/- per hectare at an interest rate between 11% and 12%.
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Agriculture,Rural & Environment

name: Establishment of Regional Semen Production Laboratory and Semen Bank for sheep and goat
ministry: Ministry of Fisheries,Animal Husbandry and Dairying
description: Under the Establishment of Regional Semen Production Laboratory and Semen Bank for Sheep and Goat Scheme, the Central Government will provide assistance for the establishment of frozen semen production laboratories for goats and liquid semen production laboratories for sheep at the regional level.

name: Goat Unit Scheme On Grants And Bank Loans
description: The scheme provides financial support through grants and bank loans to farmers to purchase (10+1) goat units for milk and meat production. The scheme covers a 40% subsidy for general applicants and 60% for SC/ST beneficiaries, based on a total unit cost of ₹77,456/-.

name: Kisan Credit Card
ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
description: The Kisan Credit Card (KCC) scheme was introduced in 1998 for issue of Kisan Credit Cards to farmers on the basis of their holdings for uniform adoption by the banks so that farmers may use them to readily purchase agriculture inputs and draw cash for their production needs.

name: Micro Credit Finance
description: Under the Micro Credit Finance Scheme, beneficiaries from the Charmkar Community receive financial assistance of up to ₹50,000 at an interest rate of 5% per annum. This assistance includes a subsidy of ₹10,000, with the remaining amount provided as a loan.
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Business & Entrepreneurship

name: Micro Credit Finance (NSFDC)
ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: The scheme is implemented by the National Scheduled Castes Finance & Development Corporation, Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment, Govt. of India. Under this scheme, loans are provided to individuals from the SC community for units costing up to ₹1,40,000/- for income-generating activities.
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Business & Entrepreneurship

name: District Central Cooperative Banks and through its Branches: For Revamped Micro Credit Loan for Women Vendors of Flower, Vegetable, Fruit etc.
description: The scheme provides revamped micro credit loans through District Central Cooperative Banks to support women vendors selling flowers, vegetables, fruits etc. Loans range from  ₹100/- to  ₹5,000/- with an interest rate of 11%.
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Business & Entrepreneurship

name: Term Loan Scheme- Credit Line 1 for Minority Community
description: The scheme is implemented by the Haryana Backward Classes and Economically Weaker Sections Kalyan Nigam. Under this scheme, loans of up to ₹20,00,000/- are provided at a concessional interest rate to individuals from minority communities to enhance their employability.
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Business & Entrepreneurship

name: Indira Gandhi Shehri Credit Card Yojana
description:
Indira Gandhi Urban Credit Card Scheme-2021 is implemented to provide employment / self-employment opportunities in
urban areas and to provide financial resources for everyday needs.

name: Micro Credit Finance under NSKFDC- Haryana
description: Under this scheme, loan is provided to Safai Karamchari and their dependents for projects with a maximum cost up to ₹1,00,000/- per beneficiaries for small and petty trade/business and various income generating activities.
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Business & Entrepreneurship

name: National Savings Certificates (VIII-Issue) Scheme
description: The scheme “National Savings Certificates (VIII-Issue) Scheme” was launched by the Department of Economic Affairs, Ministry of Finance, Government of India to promote a culture of long-term savings among individuals.

name: National Savings Time Deposit (TD)
description: The objective of the National Savings Time Deposit (TD) scheme is to promote safe and fixed-term savings by offering assured returns, encouraging individuals to invest regularly with flexible deposit amounts and no upper limit.

name: Post Office Savings Account(SB)
description: The objective of the Post Office Savings Account (SB) scheme is to encourage people to save money safely with the government. It offers easy access, a low minimum balance of ₹500, and steady interest, helping individuals build regular saving habits.

name: Mahila Samman Savings Certificate
description: The scheme aims to provide a secure savings option with assured returns for women. Through this scheme, 7.5% interest and flexible savings benefits are provided to women and minor girls.
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Women and Child

name: Public Provident Fund Account(PPF)
description: The objective of the Public Provident Fund (PPF) scheme is to promote regular savings by offering a safe, long-term investment with good interest rates, encouraging financial security and disciplined saving habits.

name: Balika Samrithi Yojana
description: “Balika Samrithi Yojana” by the Dept of Women & Child Development, Govt of Pondicherry was introduced to improve the status of the girl child and provide nutritious food to the girl child. Financial assistance of ₹500 in the form of a National Savings Certificate is provided to lactating mothers.
category: Social welfare & Empowerment, Women and Child

name: Atal Pension Yojana
description: Atal Pension Yojana (APY) is an old age income security scheme for a  savings account holder  in the age group of 18-40 years,  who is not an income tax-payee. It helps to address longevity risks among  workers in unorganized sector and encourages the workers to voluntarily save for retirement.

name: Grant of Incentive for Marriage Between Differently Abled Person
description: Through this scheme, an incentive of ₹2,00,000/- is provided, comprising ₹40,000 in cash and ₹1,60,000/- in the form of a National Savings Certificate (NSC), for the marriage between differently-abled individuals. The selection is periodical and depends on the availability of funds.

name: State Food Scheme (Yellow Ration Card)
description: The scheme aims to provide rice at subsidized rates to yellow ration card holders in the state, under which 7.50 kg of rice is distributed to each card holder every month at the rate of ₹11.00 per kg.

name: Mukhyamantri Sampoorna Pushti Yojana: Maternal Nutrition
description: The scheme aims to provide supplementary Take Home Ration (THR) in the form of nutrient-rich food products to pregnant women and lactating mothers across the state.

name: Mukhyamantri Sampoorna Pushti Yojana: Purna Aahaara for Children (6 months - 5 years)
description: The scheme aims to provide nutritional support to Severely Acute Malnourished (SAM) children. Under the scheme, eligible beneficiaries are provided Take Home Ration (THR) of 3 kg per month, along with 30 eggs per month, for a duration of 112 days.

name: Scheme for Adolescent Girls- Bihar
description: This scheme is implemented in Bihar since 2011 through the Anganwadi centers under the Integrated Child Development Project. Under this scheme, adolescent girls aged 11 to 14 years who are not attending school receive a monthly take-home ration and skill development training.

name: Transgender Utthan Kosh – Identity Card for Transgender
description: This scheme aims to identify transgender persons and issuing identity cards to them. This certificate/identity card will be valid for all government purposes, including obtaining a ration card, Aadhaar card, birth certificate, etc.

name: Free Supply of Sarees and Dhothies to the Poor People
description: The scheme was introduced to provide two sets of clothing items to poor people (other than SC/Fisherman) once in a year as a measure of Social Security. The beneficiaries are identified based on the data from the Civil Supplies and Consumer Affairs Department in Puducherry.

name: Mukhyamantri Sampoorna Pushti Yojana: Adolescent Girls Nutrition
description: The scheme aims to enhance nutritional support for all adolescent girls aged 15 -19 years across the state. However, in the 10 Aspirational Districts, the coverage is limited to girls aged 18 -19 years.

name: State Marriage Assistance Scheme For Poor Girls
description: A social welfare scheme by the Social Welfare Department of the Government of Jammu & Kashmir, for Poor Girls of Marriageable Age who belong to either AAY (Antyodaya Anna Yojana) or PHH (Priority Households) ration card holder families. The scheme is operational in all the districts across the UT.
category: Social welfare & Empowerment, Women and Child

name: BPL Scholarship for College Students
description: The scheme “BPL Scholarship For College Students” was implemented by the Department of Higher Education, Government of Chhattisgarh since 2005 to provide financial assistance to meritorious students from BPL category families to meet a part of their day-to-day expenses while pursuing higher studies.

name: Schemes for welfare of School Children belonging to BPL and BC(A) families: Monthly Stipend for BPL Students
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance to students from BPL students to support their education. Under this scheme, a monthly stipend is provided to students studying in classes 1 to 12 in Haryana Government schools.

name: Marriage Assistance to Person with Disability / BPL
description: The scheme aims to support differently-abled brides/bridegrooms from BPL families by providing financial assistance to meet marriage-related expenses. Under this scheme, an amount of ₹30,000/- is provided to Scheduled Tribe, differently-abled brides/bridegrooms for their first marriage.

name: BPL (Below Poverty Line) Student Welfare Scholarship - Technical Education
description: The scheme aims to provide financial assistance in the form of scholarships to the economically weaker students studying in government engineering and polytechnic colleges of Chhattisgarh.  The scheme offers financial aid to students enrolled in professional courses.

name: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme
description: A non-contributory pension scheme to provide social security to widows of poor family (BPL)  of the society.
category: Social welfare & Empowerment, Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Women and Child

name: Social Security Pension Scheme
description: Under this scheme, a monthly pension of ₹500/- is provided to Below Poverty Line (BPL) Persons with Disabilities (PwDs) and dwarf individuals to support them in living a respectful life.

name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme- Bihar
description: Under this scheme, a monthly pension of ₹400/- is provided to persons with disabilities in the age group of 18 to 79 years who belong to Below Poverty Line (BPL) families to support them financially. This scheme is centrally sponsored.

name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme
description: A non-contributory pension scheme to provide social security to Divyangjans aged 18 and above who belong to a poor family (BPL) in society.
category: Banking,Financial Services and Insurance, Social welfare & Empowerment

name: Sukhad Sahara Yojana
description: Under this scheme, financial assistance of ₹500/- per month are provided to the widows and deserted women who are living below poverty line (BPL) to support them in living a respectful life.
category: Social welfare & Empowerment, Women and Child

name: Sudama Shishyavritti Scheme (Class 11th and 12th)
description: Under this scheme, scholarships are provided to students studying in Class 11 and Class 12 in government schools who reside in a hostel, have an annual family income of less than ₹1,00,000/-, and belong to the Below Poverty Line (BPL) category.

name: Financial Assistance To Disabled Students Pursuing (10th, 11th, 12th Equivalent Exams)
description: The scheme “Financial Assistance to Disabled Students Pursuing (10th, 11th, 12th Equivalent Exams)” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala.

name: Snehapoorvam Scheme
description: Kerala Government has launched a noble initiative “Snehapoorvam Scheme” to provide financial assistance to orphans who are living in the family, with their relatives, friends, or the support of the community under the Social Welfare Department implemented through Social Security Mission.

name: Chief Minister’s Free Diagnostic Services
description: The Chief Minister’s free diagnostic services is envisaged to ensure the availability of a minimum set of diagnostic services at government-run health institutions. Under the program, CT scan, X-Ray, and laboratory services are provided free of cost to all irrespective of APL and BPL citizens.

name: Supply of Dhotis and Sarees to Scheduled Caste (SC) People
description: The scheme “Supply of Dhotis and Sarees to Scheduled Caste (SC) People” by the Adi Dravidar Welfare and Scheduled Tribes Welfare Department, Union Territory of Puducherry is introduced to provide clothing items (lungi, shirt, saree, blouse, etc) to the Scheduled Caste (SC) people of Puducherry.

name: Incentive for the SC Widow Re-Marriage
description: Under this scheme, the Social Welfare Department, Government of Karnataka gives incentives to the remarried widows belonging to SC Community. The incentive amount is ₹ 3 Lakh.
category: Social welfare & Empowerment, Women and Child

name: Gagan Bharari Shiksha Yojana for SC Students
description: The scheme "Gagan Bharari Shiksha Yojana for SC Students" aims to provide additional financial assistance to Scheduled Caste students to supplement their Post Matric Scholarship maintenance allowance. Additional monthly allowances are provided to meet food, travel, and disability-related expenses.

name: Entrepreneurship Development by SC & ST Women in Science Technology Engineering Mathematics
description: ED/SC-ST- WISTEM)” is aimed for exploring the potential of entrepreneurship along with improvement in the livelihood options for unemployed SC & ST women in Science, Technology, Engineering & Mathematics (STEM) areas using tools of Science, Technology & Innovation.

name: Post-Graduate Scholarships for Professional Courses for SC/ST Candidates
description: The scheme has been initiated to provide opportunity to deprived sections of the society, viz. SC/ST for undertaking postgraduate level studies in Professional subjects like Engineering & Technology, Management, Pharmacy etc. in recognised Indian Universities/Institutions/Colleges.

name: Ambedkar International Scholarship - SC
description: The "Ambedkar International Scholarship - SC" Scheme by the Rajasthan Social Justice and Empowerment Department provides financial assistance to meritorious SC students for pursuing Ph.D. studies in foreign universities in Humanities and Social Sciences.

name: Reimbursement of Tution Fee for SC/ST/OBC/Min students in Public Schools in Class I to XII
description: The scheme aims to provide financial support by reimbursing tuition and compulsory fees for SC/ST/OBC students from low-income families (below ₹3,00,000/- per annum) studying in recognized schools in Delhi. Beneficiaries must meet academic and attendance criteria.

name: Post Matric Scholarship for SC students (Delhi)
description: The scheme "Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students" aims to support SC students financially for post-matriculation studies. Benefits include fee reimbursement and monthly allowances. Intended beneficiaries are SC students with a family income below ₹2,50,000/- annually.

name: State Government SC Scholarship (Class 1 to 10)
description: The scheme was launched by School Education Department, Govt. of Madhya Pradesh, aims to improve educational status of SC students by providing scholarships. Under this scheme, scholarships are provided to SC girl students in Classes 1 to 5,and to both boys & girls in SC category in Classes 6 to 10.

name: State Technical Scholarship for ST Student
description: The financial assistance is provided to students of Scheduled Tribe Communities who are pursuing Diploma/ Degree/Post Graduated/course in Engineering Institutes recognized by All India Council for Technical Education and, also provided to students who are pursuing UG or PG in Forestry courses.

name: Fee Waiver Scheme For SC/ST Students Pursuing Higher Education
description: "Fee Waiver Scheme for SC/ST Students Pursuing Higher Education" provides free access to every SC/ST student, to the institutions of higher learning so that that no eligible SC/ST students are deprived of higher education for want of resources.

name: Scheme of Assistance to SC/ST Entrepreneurs
description: The scheme aims to extend financial assistance to SC/ST Entrepreneurs for setting up new Micro Enterprises or for expansion of existing units. The applications for this scheme are accepted online through the PIPDIC portal.

name: Incentive For The Simple Marriage (Scheduled Tribe)
description: The scheme "Incentive for the Simple Marriage" was launched by the Tribal Welfare Department, Government of Karnataka. The scheme provides an incentive of ₹50,000/- to ST individuals residing in Karnataka who marry another ST individual on or after 11th August 2015.

name: Financial Assistance For Purchase Of Stationery To SC/ST/OBC/Minorities Students
description: Welfare scheme of Department For The Welfare Of SC/ST/OBC’s/Minorities to provide help for purchase of stationery to SC/ST/OBC/Minorities Students of 1st to 12th class studying Govt. of India/GNCT of Delhi/Aided Recognized schools.

name: SC/ST Pre Matric Scholarship - Uttar Pradesh
description: The Uttar Pradesh Social Welfare Department offers a Pre Matric Scholarship for Scheduled Caste (SC) or Scheduled Tribe (ST) students. This scholarship aims to financially assist students from these categories to pursue secondary education and complete their matriculation.

name: AGR 3 (Farm Mechanization) Scheme For ST Farmers
description: The scheme “AGR 3 (Farm Mechanization) Scheme for ST Farmers” was started by the Department of Agriculture, Farmers Welfare & Co-operation, Government of Gujarat.

name: Special Incentive to OBC Meritorious Students (Boys & Girls)
description: This scheme offers a financial incentive of up to ₹10,000/- to meritorious Other Backward Classes (OBC) students who have achieved 80% or higher marks in the HSSLC examination. The objective is to motivate and encourage OBC students to pursue higher education.

name: National Fellowship For OBC Students
description: "National Fellowship for OBC Students" was launched by the University Grants Commission (UGC) during the financial year 2014-15 to increase the opportunities for the students of Other Backward Classes (OBCs) to pursue higher education leading to acquiring degrees such as M.Phil. and Ph.D.

name: Gagan Bharari Shiksha Yojana for OBC (Dhangar) Students
description: The scheme "Gagan Bharari Shiksha Yojana for OBC (Dhangar) Students" by the Directorate of Social Welfare, Government of Goa aims to provide additional financial assistance to OBC (Dhangar) students to supplement their Post Matric Scholarship maintenance allowance.

name: PM-YASASVI: Pre-Matric Scholarship for OBC, EBC and DNT Students
ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: The objective of the Centrally Sponsored Scheme of Pre-Matric Scholarship for OBC, EBC, and DNT students (who are not covered under SC, ST, or OBC) is welfare and motivation to the children of these categories by providing financial assistance at pre-matriculation or secondary stage.

name: Centrally Sponsored Scheme of Pre-matric Scholarship to Other Backward Classes (OBC) for Studies in India
ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: "Centrally Sponsored Scheme of Pre-matric Scholarship to Other Backward Classes for Studies in India" is a Scholarship Scheme by the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment. The objective is to award scholarships to school-going children of poorer OBC parents.

name: PM-YASASVI: Top Class School Education for OBC, EBC and DNT Students
ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: The objective of the scheme is to provide premium education to the meritorious students belonging to OBC, EBC, and DNT categories by funding their education from Class 9 onwards till they complete Class 12.

name: Financial Assistance to OBC Students Appearing in the Mains Examination of UPSC
description: The scheme provides financial grants to the OBC students for appearing in the UPSC Mains Exam. An amount upto ₹50,000/- is provided to each beneficiary. The assistance is extended depending on the applicant meeting the eligibility criteria and the documents submitted.

name: PM-YASASVI: Top Class College Education for OBC, EBC and DNT Students
ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: The objective of the scheme is to recognize and promote quality education amongst Students belonging to OBC, EBC and DNT categories by providing full financial support. The Scheme will cover OBC/EBC/DNT students for pursuing studies beyond Class XII.

name: PM-YASASVI: Post-Matric Scholarship for OBC, EBC and DNT Students
ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: The objective of the scheme is to provide financial assistance to the OBC, EBC and DNT students studying at post-matriculation or post-secondary stage to enable them to complete their education.

name: Centrally Sponsored Scheme of Post-Matric Scholarship for OBC, EBC  and DNT Students for studying in India
description: "Centrally Sponsored Scheme of Post-Matric Scholarship for OBC, EBC  and DNT Students for studying in India" aims at providing financial assistance to OBC, EWS and DNT students to support their education. The scholarship covers tuition fees, maintenance allowances, and other academic expenses.

name: Free Scooty Distribution for Girls (GEN-CATEGAORY-EWS)
description: Under this scheme, meritorious girl students from government and private schools who have scored 85% or above in the Class 10th and 12th (Arts, Commerce, Science streams) examinations are provided with a free scooty, along with a helmet and petrol.

name: Bicycle Distribution Scheme for Girl Students of Economically Weaker Section
description: Under this scheme, free bicycles will be distributed to 5,800 girl students belonging to the Economically Weaker Section (EWS), who are studying in government schools from Class 6 to Class 8, to facilitate their commute between home and school.

name: Mukhyamantri Shiksha Alankar Yojana for Students of Economically Weaker Section
description: Under the scheme, a cash award of ₹50,000 will be given to students studying in government schools affiliated with the Rajasthan Board of Secondary Education, Ajmer, who secure the highest marks in the EWS category in the Class 10th and Class 12th examinations (Arts, Commerce, and Science streams).

name: Pandit Dindayal Upadhyay Awas Yojana (Developing Caste Welfare) (EBC)
description: The scheme aims to support Economically Weaker Sections (EWS) by offering financial aid up to ₹1,20,000/- for house construction. This scheme also ensures that Economically Weaker Sections receive support in securing shelter.

name: Sathiyavanimuthu Ammaiyar Ninaivu Free Supply of Sewing Machine Scheme
description: The 'Sathiyavanimuthu Ammaiyar Ninaivu Free Supply of Sewing Machine Scheme' was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to provide sewing machines to destitute, deserted women/widows, differently abled men & women to increase self-employment.
category: Social welfare & Empowerment, Women and Child

name: Financial Support Scheme
description: With a view to extend the benefits of equity and access to quality education to the economically weak students, the University has introduced a financial support scheme for such students which will include fee waiver of all components of fee paid by students (except examination fee & hostel fee).

name: Mukhya Mantri Sahara Yojana
description: The State Government has launched the 'Sahara Scheme' to provide financial assistance of Rs. 3000 per month to the patients belonging to the economically weaker sections of the society, who are suffering from specified diseases such Parkinson, Malignant Cancer, Paralysis etc.

name: Ambedkar DBT Voucher Scheme
description: The scheme aims to support students from SC, ST, OBC, MBC, and EWS categories by providing financial aid for accommodation. The students receive ₹2,000/- per month for up to 10 months per academic year.

name: Sardar Patel Awas Yojana
description: Sardar Patel Awas Yojana (SPAY) is a housing scheme launched by the government of Gujarat in India to provide affordable housing to economically weaker sections (EWS) and low-income groups (LIG) of society.

name: Scholarship For Transgender Students
description: The scheme “Scholarship for Transgender Students” was launched by the Social Justice Department, Government of Kerala for providing scholarships to Transgender students from 7th standard onwards studying in State Government/ Government aided/ Self Financing schools.

name: Pension Scheme for Transgender
description: Launched on 1st August 2015, the scheme "Pension Scheme for Transgender" is a Pension Scheme by the Directorate of Social Welfare and Social Education, Government of Tripura. The scheme provides financial assistance of ₹2,000/- to the transgender residents of Tripura who have no source of income.

name: Transgender Utthan Kosh - Post Matric Scholarship for Studying Transgender
description: The scheme aims to support transgender students pursuing post-matric education. Under this scheme, transgender students receive a monthly scholarship of ₹1,000/- to cover educational expenses for their post-matric studies.

name: Transgender Pension Scheme
description: The Transgender Pension Scheme is a welfare initiative launched by the Government of Himachal Pradesh for the upliftment and support of transgender persons.

name: Transgender Utthan Kosh - Pre Matric Scholarship for Studying Transgender
description: The scheme aims to support transgender students by providing scholarships to encourage their education and social upliftment. Under this scheme, transgender students receive a monthly scholarship of ₹225/- per month to cover educational expenses from primary to pre-matric levels.

name: Pension Scheme for Destitute Transgender
description: The 'Pension Scheme for Destitute Transgender' was launched by the Social Welfare and Women Empowerment Department, Government of Tamil Nadu. The scheme aims to help poor transgender above 40 years of age who are unable to earn their livelihood.

name: Garima Greh Shelter Homes For Transgender Persons
ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
description: Garima Greh aims to provide shelter to Destitute & abandoned Transgender persons with basic amenities like shelter, food, medical care and recreational facilities.

name: Transgender Utthan Kosh - Self Employment Programme for Transgender
description: The scheme objective is to provide financial assistance to transgender individuals for self-employment/business establishment. Eligible beneficiaries can receive up to ₹50,000/- or 25% of the project cost.

name: Marriage Assistance For Legally Married Transgender Couples
description: The scheme “Marriage Assistance for Legally Married Transgender Couples” was launched by the Department of Social Justice, Government of Kerala. This scheme is intended to help deprived transgender individuals who are planning to get married legally to lead a steady normal family life.

name: Procedure for Making "Orphan Certificate" for Getting Horizontal Reservation for Orphan Children
